instrument: analyzed by MS using the Lipidyzer platform, comprising a 5500 QTRAP mass spectrometer
ionization type: Phosphatidylcholine and phosphatidylethanolamine were quantified with DMS on and in negative ionization mode
labeling: lipid concentrations in cell extracts derived from HeLa–Cas9 cells stably expressing sgRNAs targeting either TMEM189 or a control genomic locus
